name: skeptical_vote

payload.name: skeptical_vote
payload.prompt_template:
{prompt}
Base your answer ONLY on what is actually visible. Do not assume an object is present just because it would be common in this kind of scene. If you cannot clearly see it, answer No.

summary: [mcnemar + e-value (paired binary)] effect=+0.1250 (B>A) CI=+0.0000..+0.2500, e=2.00 -> inconclusive [partial, coverage=100%]
